meta.title: Mōchirīī Announcements
meta.intro: Check here for schedule notes, training focus & guild updates that help everyone have fun together.

items.title: Weekly Schedule Posted
items.summary: These windows help members gather, plan & make room for fun without stress.
details: Guild Party: Every Day - 9:30 PM - 10 PM
Breaking Army: Mondays & Wednesdays - 10 PM - 12 AM
Guild Wars: Saturdays & Sundays - 8:30 PM - 11:30 PM

items.title: Gallery Submissions Open
items.summary: Send your best screenshots in the Discord gallery channel. Pretty moments from the game can become part of the site album.

items.title: Training Focus: Fundamentals
items.summary: This month we return to the basics: movement discipline, positioning, combos & mystics.
